title: Git fundamentals — repository, commit, branch, merge

module.title: Version Control with Git and GitHub

course.title: Python for AI, PE, VC and RAG

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Branch/merge flow showing main commits A→B→C, feature branch diverging at C with commits D→E, then merging back into main at F (merge commit) — illustrating isolation and recombination
artifact_plan.depth_profile_signals: 4 named sub-concepts (repository, commit, branch, merge); Implementation section has 5 ordered steps; Real-World Patterns and Best Practices warranted; branching workflow with structure to diagram
